Project.NAME: telegram-transcriber-bot
Project.keywords: telegram, transcription, whisper, faster-whisper, reports, deep research, go api, python workers, react ui, mcp, minio, postgres, redis, asynq, polling, webhook, docker compose
Project.annotation: GRACE baseline for migrating the current Telegram transcription bot into a local-first monorepo platform with one Go control plane and multiple thin adapters.

M-CONTRACTS.NAME: Contracts
M-CONTRACTS.purpose: Own shared OpenAPI, JSON schema, webhook, WebSocket, and enum contracts that every runtime surface depends on.

export-openapi.PURPOSE: Canonical HTTP contract definitions for clients and server.

export-validationSchemas.PURPOSE: Canonical JSON schema surface for HTTP, WebSocket, webhook, and internal worker DTO validation.

export-websocket-schema.PURPOSE: Canonical event envelope for UI live updates.

export-webhook-schema.PURPOSE: Canonical outbound callback envelope and delivery rules.

type-JobSnapshot.PURPOSE: Canonical job read model including lineage, artifacts, and children.

type-DeliveryStrategy.PURPOSE: Per-job delivery choice: polling or webhook.

type-ArtifactResolution.PURPOSE: Artifact metadata plus presigned MinIO download link.

type-WorkerFinalizeRequest.PURPOSE: Canonical worker finalization DTO used by all Python workers.

type-SourceSet.PURPOSE: Ordered input set backing one transcription job.

M-API-HTTP.NAME: ApiHttp
M-API-HTTP.purpose: Expose create, list, get, cancel, retry, artifact, event, and internal worker endpoints for the control plane.

export-registerRoutes.PURPOSE: Bind public and internal HTTP routes.

export-validateRequest.PURPOSE: Apply request validation and idempotency rules.

M-API-JOBS.NAME: ApiJobs
M-API-JOBS.purpose: Own job creation, lineage, status transitions, child-job reuse, retry, and cancel semantics.

export-createJob.PURPOSE: Create root and child jobs under validated business rules.

export-transitionJob.PURPOSE: Enforce allowed lifecycle transitions and version increments.

type-JobLineage.PURPOSE: Root, parent, and retry relationships preserved across all job types.

type-CombinedTranscriptionJob.PURPOSE: One transcription job bound to an ordered multi-source input set.

M-API-STORAGE.NAME: ApiStorage
M-API-STORAGE.purpose: Persist source metadata, jobs, artifacts, events, and webhook-delivery records while generating presigned artifact links.

export-persistSource.PURPOSE: Write source metadata and MinIO object references.

export-resolveArtifact.PURPOSE: Return artifact metadata plus presigned URL.

type-JobSubmission.PURPOSE: Idempotent create-request persistence including multi-file upload normalization.

type-WebhookDelivery.PURPOSE: Durable webhook retry state across API restarts.

type-SourceSetRecord.PURPOSE: Persistent ordered source set reused by single-file and combined transcription jobs.

M-API-QUEUE.NAME: ApiQueue
M-API-QUEUE.purpose: Bridge job creation and background execution through asynq queues and retry policies.

export-enqueueJob.PURPOSE: Publish typed asynq tasks for each job type.

M-API-EVENTS.NAME: ApiEvents
M-API-EVENTS.purpose: Emit timeline, WebSocket, and webhook events from authoritative job transitions.

export-broadcastEvent.PURPOSE: Publish WebSocket updates to connected clients.

export-scheduleWebhook.PURPOSE: Persist and dispatch webhook deliveries with bounded retry.

type-JobEventEnvelope.PURPOSE: Versioned event model shared across timeline, WebSocket, and webhook.

M-WORKER-COMMON.NAME: WorkerCommon
M-WORKER-COMMON.purpose: Host shared Python execution utilities reused by transcription, report, and deep-research workers.

export-artifactWriters.PURPOSE: Write worker outputs to MinIO and return metadata payloads.

M-WORKER-TRANSCRIPTION.NAME: WorkerTranscription
M-WORKER-TRANSCRIPTION.purpose: Execute transcription jobs by reusing existing source materialization, faster-whisper, and transcript rendering logic.

export-runTranscription.PURPOSE: Claim, execute, emit progress, persist artifacts, and finalize transcription jobs.

type-OrderedWorkerInput.PURPOSE: Ordered transcription inputs resolved by the internal claim surface.

M-WORKER-REPORT.NAME: WorkerReport
M-WORKER-REPORT.purpose: Execute report jobs using `cglm` and report artifact rendering while preserving current report behavior.

export-runReport.PURPOSE: Generate markdown and DOCX reports from transcript artifacts.

M-WORKER-DEEP-RESEARCH.NAME: WorkerDeepResearch
M-WORKER-DEEP-RESEARCH.purpose: Execute deep-research jobs by reusing the current evidence-driven multi-phase pipeline.

export-runDeepResearch.PURPOSE: Run the deep-research pipeline and persist the final markdown artifact.

M-WEB-UI.NAME: WebUi
M-WEB-UI.purpose: Provide local file/url submission, monitoring, artifact download, and late-wave admin operations.

export-jobDetailsPage.PURPOSE: Show status, lineage, artifacts, and admin actions.

M-TELEGRAM-ADAPTER.NAME: TelegramAdapter
M-TELEGRAM-ADAPTER.purpose: Act as a thin Telegram transport client over the HTTP API while preserving current user-visible bot flows.

export-handleIncomingMedia.PURPOSE: Download Telegram media temporarily and submit it to the API.

export-handleCallbacks.PURPOSE: Map Telegram button callbacks to report, deep-research, retry, and segmented-artifact actions.

export-submitCombinedMedia.PURPOSE: Submit Telegram media groups or buffered sequential media as one combined transcription job.

M-MCP-ADAPTER.NAME: McpAdapter
M-MCP-ADAPTER.purpose: Expose the same platform capabilities to MCP consumers through a thin adapter over the HTTP API.

export-createTranscriptionJob.PURPOSE: Create transcription jobs through the MCP surface.

export-inspectJob.PURPOSE: Read jobs, artifacts, and child-job results.

M-INFRA-COMPOSE.NAME: InfraCompose
M-INFRA-COMPOSE.purpose: Define and bootstrap the local runtime topology for API, workers, adapters, and storage dependencies.
M-INFRA-COMPOSE.depends: M-API-HTTP, M-WORKER-TRANSCRIPTION, M-WORKER-REPORT, M-WORKER-DEEP-RESEARCH, M-WEB-UI, M-TELEGRAM-ADAPTER, M-MCP-ADAPTER

export-composeStack.PURPOSE: Bring up the full local stack with deterministic service boundaries.
